hero.title: Welcome to AISE Lab Artificial Intelligence and Software Engineering Laboratory
hero.subtitle: Where we are dedicated to advancing the frontiers of software engineering through innovative Artificial Intelligence technologies

card.description-paragraph1: Aiselab is a research and innovation lab focused on the intersection of Artificial Intelligence and Software Engineering. We operate as a multidisciplinary environment within computer science, exploring how intelligent technologies can transform the software development lifecycle, from design and implementation to testing, maintenance, and the human aspects of engineering.
card.description-paragraph2: Our team brings together researchers, students, and professionals committed to creating impactful solutions by combining strong academic foundations with practical applications. We work on projects ranging from intelligent automation of engineering tasks to investigating how AI can support decision-making and team collaboration in software development.
card.description-paragraph3: More than a technical lab, Aiselab is a space for continuous learning, active collaboration, and real-world impact. Our goal is to advance the field of software engineering through relevant research, strategic partnerships, and initiatives that bridge scientific knowledge with practical needs.

teamSection.title: Team
teamSection.subtitle: Behind every line of code, every research paper, and every prototype, there's a dedicated team of thinkers, builders, and learners.

toolsSection.title: Tools
toolsSection.subtitle: Discover the innovative solutions we're building. Each tool tackles real-world challenges to advance in the software engineering field.

awarded.title: Awards
awarded.subtitle: Selected papers that received awards and special recognition.

callToAction.title: Be part of AISE Lab
callToAction.subtitle: We're growing our network of researchers, students and collaborators.  Build what's next. Bring your curiosity (and a CV).
